_comment: Local config for path-integral investigation. Benchmark + physical constants come from GC — NOT duplicated here.

renormalization._comment: Post-integration choices for CW one-loop. mu_choice = scale where ln(M²/μ²) vanishes.

A4_mass_formula._comment: M_eff²(θ) = m_χ²(cos²θ + sin²θ/K). K = 9 from A₄ CG coefficients.

dark_sector._comment: Dark QCD / axion parameters for Layers 6 + DE. NOT in global_config — specific to path integral.

cosmological_reference._comment: H₀ in natural units + ρ_Λ. Derived from GC's h_hubble = 0.674.

missing_from_GC._comment: Physical constants not yet in global_config.json. Universal — should eventually migrate to GC.

grids._comment: Discretization for numerical path integrals. Change here → changes ALL downstream results.

physics_checks._comment: Parameters for post-integral physics checks (Tests from dark-energy-T-breaking).

delta_N_eff._comment: Dark sector d.o.f. and decoupling hypothesis.

gauge_group._comment: SU(2)_d with 1 fundamental Majorana triplet. beta_0 = 11*N_d/3 - 2*N_f/3.
